title: Squiddo's Evil Cat mod (RECREATION)
description: Recreation of TheRealSquiddo's evil cat mod
body:
![cat O_O logo :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63209fec6e35da60d0b2b5c68cd89d45395f99ef.png)

If you know Squiddo, either from Lifesteal or Your YouTube reccomendations, you might've seen THIS video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AoqH1YKeZ3Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
You probably want a download link but she said clearly she wont make one, so... uh.

## Features
- The Nightmare Block and Nightmare Catalyst
- The Nightmare Dimension
- The Oggly music disc
- The Evil cat and the Heavenly cat mobs
- The Awesome ore, and finally the Guacamole chips and armour.
![The features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9594f4b07ae3bca4ea54feb28f2985fb84a2f3cb_0.webp)
- Of course, all credits to @Squiddo (on YouTube) for some Sprites i screenshoted from her video :)
